title: Kielbasa-Style Hash with Herbal Twist
description: A vegan twist on a traditional hash, featuring the smoky flavor of kielbasa and a hint of herbal goodness.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the hash brown potatoes and cook until golden brown, about 10 minutes.
Add the kielbasa-style vegan sausage and cook until heated through.
Sprinkle with herbs de provence and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional herbs if desired.
Cook the kielbasa-style vegan sausage in the microwave according to package instructions before adding to the skillet.
To ensure the hash is crispy, do not stir it too much while it's cooking.
If using a non-stick skillet, reduce the heat to medium-low to prevent scorching.
Add the cooked hash to a serving dish and top with the kielbasa-style vegan sausage mixture.
For an extra crispy hash, try cooking it in a cast-iron skillet or under the broiler for a few minutes.
